text: in this the implement , make a note that you have to put the files in structured package with domain specific names like if it is android have the same naming and if it is typescript have the same name and also make context.md if you are making a new package which will have oneline of each file which will give the context of each file what is the responsibility of the file since you will be implementing a plan you would have a better context too

in the core in exprience core divide the login flow app/src/main/java/com/leapscholar/app/experience/core/LoginFlowConfig.kt and its other items should be move to one place where app/src/main/java/com/leapscholar/app/login/UserLoginStateBuilder.kt and app/src/main/java/com/leapscholar/app/login/UserLoginStateHandler.kt

instead of putting if condition in @ShortlistViewModel in getCourses make a different getAthenaCourseRequest for getReccomended and since in app/src/main/java/com/leapscholar/app/shortlist/domain/ShortlistUseCase.kt we are using the same request and exposing the same flow , how can we differntiate the recommened and normal flow
make 2 different functions for getRecommended and getCourses in shortlist viewmodel on tab change call the api for getting the courses
should we not  not put the call api in LaunchedEffect
segregate the recommened course and shortlist course in composable so we keep the shortlist screen different
put the composable in 2 different files
you have not updated the context.md
